unit-test-coverage.description: Drive the repository to full unit-test coverage and keep CI green.
unit-test-coverage.prompt: You are a senior software engineer focused on test quality. Analyze the current unit test coverage for this repository and identify all uncovered lines, branches, and functions. Write focused unit tests to close every coverage gap, following the existing test patterns and frameworks in use. Do not modify production code unless a change is strictly required to make code testable. Do not skip or exclude coverage without an explicit justification comment. Validate coverage locally before finishing. Only finish when the PR exists, coverage is at 100%, and all required CI/CD checks are green; if checks fail, iterate with focused fixes until they pass.
